title: Deendayal Research Institute – Stenographer, Program Assistant and More

basic_details.job_title: Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Stenographer, Program Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deendayal Research Institute Various Posts Recruitment 2026 offers various posts including Assistant, Program Assistant (Computer), Stenographer Grade III and Auxiliary Staff - Driver for candidates possessing 10th, 12th, and Graduate qualifications with required experience, with offline applications open until 07-06-2026 on www.gonda.kvk4.in.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 30 days from the date of publication of advertisement in Employment News

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree, Bachelor's degree in Computer science/ Computer Application/B.Tech (Computer Science), 12th passed, Matriculation or equivalent.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.9300-34800 + GP of Rs. 4200/-(Pre revised) to Rs.5200-20200 + GP of Rs. 2000/-(Pre revised)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Deendayal Research Institute Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
